title: Caldera - System Network Connections Discovery (Linux)
description: Detects enumeration of active network connections on Linux systems. Caldera T1049 emulation uses netstat, ss, and /proc/net file reads to list established connections, listening ports, and socket state for network mapping.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*netstat -an*' or msg like '*netstat -anp*' or msg like '*netstat -tulpn*' or msg like '*netstat -tunap*' or msg like '*netstat -plantu*' or msg like '*netstat -ntlp*')) or ((msg like '*ss -anp*' or msg like '*ss -tlnp*' or msg like '*ss -tunap*' or msg like '*ss -s *' or msg like '*ss -plnt*')) or ((msg like '*cat /proc/net/tcp*' or msg like '*cat /proc/net/udp*' or msg like '*cat /proc/net/tcp6*')))
